sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51574" key="i)wtakismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰωτᾰκισμός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, doubling of <sense id="n51574.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">i</tr_>, as in <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Troiia, Maiia</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5.32</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Isid.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Etym.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.32.7</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n51574.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">repetition of i</tr_>, as <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Iunio Iuno Ionis iure irascitur</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.Cap.</author> </bibl><*> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">514</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
